message:
feat(engine): versioned rewrite pack — canonical pair keys, cost model guards, and pack diff

Major expansion of the rewrite pack subsystem for safer cross-pack
analysis and cost-model operations:

Canonical pair key:
- New canonical_pack_pair_key() sorts pack IDs lexicographically to
  ensure (A,B) and (B,A) produce the same interference key — prevents
  duplicate interference entries for the same pair

Cost model guards:
- DeterministicCostModel::instruction_cost() and rule_gain() now return
  0 for non-canonical models, preventing stale or corrupted cost data
  from influencing optimization decisions

Pack diff and analysis:
- Extended rule comparison and pack-level diff capabilities for
  detecting semantic changes between pack versions
- Tests for canonical key symmetry, cost model guard behavior, and
  pack diff scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
